note: Stage-1 control-tick timing decomposition + async correctness, native Linux host. FastDDS rmw_fastrtps_cpp intra-container. Policy=lerobot/act_aloha_sim_transfer_cube_human (fine-tuned SmolVLA checkpoint absent after host move; tick cadence is policy-agnostic since PredictChunk is off the critical path). Config: fps=50, g=0.5, ramp_in=5, 50 episodes seeds 0-49, 15080 ticks.
host: native Linux, docker nvidia default runtime, GPU RTX A2000 Laptop 4GB
async_verdict: works as designed (SmolVLA Alg.1): idle~0 on every real tick, the 82ms PredictChunk latency is fully hidden behind queue execution.

grpc_step_bridge_to_sim_server.includes: mujoco env.step + EGL render + proto pack + gRPC serialize + docker net + GPU/CPU contention

predictchunk_rtt_client_to_policy_server.note: async worker thread; does not gate the tick

root_cause: Tick=40ms because ~30ms of real work (18.3ms gRPC sim Step + 11.7ms DDS 900KiB round trip + 0.06ms node) is rounded UP to 2x the fixed 20ms/50Hz bridge timer. DDS image transport is only ~12ms here (fast intra-host FastDDS), NOT the ~80ms the previous host recorded. The old 6.6Hz (151ms/tick: 70.5ms EGL render + ~80ms DDS) did not reproduce on native Linux with a real GPU.
levers: event-driven step instead of 50Hz wall timer -> ~30ms/33Hz
JPEG-encode the 900KiB frame -> trims the 12ms DDS leg
move policy-server contention off the render GPU -> gRPC Step 18ms->11ms
